mission.title: kuma: Support path prefix configuration for the GUI
mission.description: Support path prefix configuration for the GUI . This issue affects 3+ users.

steps.title: Identify kuma troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your kuma deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n kuma -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kuma
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kuma -n kuma --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review kuma configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant kuma configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n kuma -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kuma
kubectl get configmap -n kuma -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=kuma
```
### Description

Right now Kuma GUI expects that Kuma API is under same path without `/gui` prefix.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Support path prefix configuration for the GUI
steps.description:
### Summary
This PR adds the GUI URL in the index API response.
### Full changelog

* [Implement ...]
* [Fix ...]

### Issues resolved

Fix #3280

### Documentation

### Testing

### Backwards compatibility
```yaml
{
  "apiBaseUrl": "http://localhost:5681/api",
  "guiBasePath": "/gui"
}
```

steps.title: Confirm Support path prefix configuration for the GUI  is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kuma -n kuma --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n kuma --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.
